data_description.infrared_entity_id: The IR blaster with line of sight to the fan.
data_description.temperature_sensor_entity_id: Shown as the current temperature on the thermostat; the fan itself reports nothing back.

abort.no_emitters: No infrared emitter entities found. Set up an IR blaster (e.g. Broadlink) first.

set_assumed_state.name: Set assumed state
set_assumed_state.description: Corrects the tracked state without sending IR. Use after the physical remote or panel was used, or when a command was missed.

power.name: Power
power.description: Whether the fan is actually on.

auto.name: Auto mode
auto.description: Whether auto (thermostat) mode is actually active.

send_button.name: Send button
send_button.description: Sends raw remote button presses without updating the assumed state. Useful for testing and troubleshooting.

calibrate.name: Calibrate
calibrate.description: Re-syncs by stepping to a known boundary: with auto off, forces speed to 1 then back to the assumed speed; with auto on, forces the target to 60°F then back to the assumed target.
